codeReview.summary: The commit self-hosts Fraunces/Manrope as WOFF2 assets, adds @font-face declarations with font-display: swap, removes Google Fonts CDN links from +layout.svelte and app.html, and leaves no remaining Inter/Newsreader or Google Fonts references in frontend code. Changes align with the feature description and expected behavior without introducing functional regressions in the touched files.
